ddls:
CREATE TABLE "geography" (
  "geocode" INTEGER /* Unique geographical code */,
  "geography" TEXT /* Geographical location (e.g., province, state) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geocode")
)

CREATE TABLE "disease" (
  "disease_code" TEXT /* Unique disease code */,
  "disease" TEXT /* Disease name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_group" (
  "age_group_code" TEXT /* Unique age group code */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_target" (
  "disease_code" TEXT /* Disease code */,
  "age_group_code" TEXT /* Age group code */,
  "target_coverage" REAL /* Target vaccination coverage percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_code", "age_group_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_coverage" (
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the vaccination coverage data was recorded */,
  "geocode" INTEGER /* Geographical code associated with the location */,
  "disease_code" TEXT /* Disease code */,
  "age_group_code" TEXT /* Age group code */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the geographical location for the given year */,
  "coverage_value" REAL /* Vaccination coverage value as a percentage */,
  "vaccination_count" INTEGER /* Actual number of individuals vaccinated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Information about the source of the vaccination coverage data */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the vaccination coverage data was collected or updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year", "geocode", "disease_code", "age_group_code")
)
column_names: Year in which the vaccination coverage data was recorded
Geographical code associated with the location
Total population of the geographical location for the given year
Vaccination coverage value as a percentage
Information about the source of the vaccination coverage data
Date when the vaccination coverage data was collected or updated
